zh.lifeSummary: 當Grizel Sempill於1547年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金時，她的父親Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill46歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwald43歲。她於1565年5月11日與Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blair在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1609年12月28日在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾享年62歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特巴 比阿。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Grizel Sempill于1547年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾厄斯金时，她的父亲Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill46岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwald43岁。她于1565年5月11日与Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blair在英国苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1609年12月28日在英国苏格兰阿吉爾享年62岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特巴 比阿。

nameMeanings.name: Sempill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Semple
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): nickname from Middle English, Older Scots, and Old French simple ‘simple, straightforward, humble’ (from Latin simplus). The Scottish name was taken to Ulster in the 17th century, and a Scottish family of this name held the hereditary post of Sheriff of Renfrewshire from the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Grizel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Griselda , used particularly in Scotland, and in the north of England at least as late as the 18th century. The name has now died out, no doubt in part because of its similarity to the vocabulary word grizzle meaning ‘to grumble or whine’.

en.lifeSummary: When Grizel Sempill was born in 1547, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill, was 46 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwald, was 43. She married Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blair on 11 May 1565, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 28 December 1609, in Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Bac Beag, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grizel Sempill est née en 1547, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwald, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blair le 11 mai 1565, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 décembre 1609, à Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Bac Beag, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Grizel Sempill 1547 in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill 46 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwald 43. Sie hat am 11. Mai 1565 in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blair geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. Dezember 1609 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Bac Beag, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Grizel Sempill è nata il nel 1547 nel Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwald, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blair il 11 maggio 1565, nel Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 28 dicembre 1609, nel Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Bac Beag, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Grizel Sempillが1547年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルスキンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempillは46歳，母Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwaldは43歳であった。1565年5月11日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアでSir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blairと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1609年12月28日にイギリススコットランドアルグイルで62歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトバック ビーグにて埋葬された。

ko.Bac Beag, Argyll and Bute, Kingdom of Sc: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 바크 브이그
ko.lifeSummary: Grizel Sempill(이)가 1547년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwald(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1565년 5월 11일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blair(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1609년 12월 28일 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 바크 브이그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Grizel Sempill nasceu em 1547, em Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwald, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blair em 11 de maio de 1565, em Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de dezembro de 1609, em Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Bac Beag, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grizel Sempill родилась в 1547 г. в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwald, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blair 11 мая 1565 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 28 декабря 1609 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности бак биг, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Grizel Sempill nació en 1547, en Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Robert Sempill , 3rd Lord Sempill, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Carlyle of Torthorwald, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blair el 11 de mayo de 1565, en Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 28 de diciembre de 1609, en Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Bac Beag, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido.
